title: ononis repens subsp. procurrens
intro: Ononis repens subsp. procurrens, a subspecies of the sainfoin plant, is a perennial legume native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its climbing or procumbent habit. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a diuretic, making it a potential remedy for urinary tract issues and digestive problems. The health benefits of Ononis repens subsp. procurrens include its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
